name: libsoap-lite-perl
title: libsoap-lite-perl
summary: Perl implementation of a SOAP client and server
description:
Perl implementation of a SOAP client and server
SOAP::Lite is a collection of Perl modules that provide a simple and
lightweight interface to the Simple Object Access Protocol (SOAP) both on
client and server side.
.
This version of SOAP::Lite supports a subset of the SOAP 1.1 specification
and has initial support for SOAP 1.2 specification.
See http://www.w3.org/TR/SOAP for details.

commands.name: stubmaker
commands.description: Generates client stubs from a WSDL file.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use SOAPsh because Perl implementation of a SOAP client and server.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use SOAPsh as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `perl SOAPsh $KFIOSA_TARGET_URL $KFIOSA_TARGET_URL` as documented upstream for SOAPsh.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `perl SOAPsh $KFIOSA_TARGET_URL $KFIOSA_TARGET_URL doubler([10,20,30])` as documented upstream for SOAPsh.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair SOAPsh with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `SOAPsh --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.readme: SOAPsh - Interactive shell for SOAP calls
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install libsoap-lite-perl. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `perl SOAPsh $KFIOSA_TARGET_URL $KFIOSA_TARGET_URL`. Further invocations from upstream: `perl SOAPsh $KFIOSA_TARGET_URL $KFIOSA_TARGET_URL doubler([10,20,30])`. Perl implementation of a SOAP client and server.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: Perl implementation of a SOAP client and server.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: SOAPsh - Interactive shell for SOAP calls.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install libsoap-lite-perl
Install with: sudo apt install libsoap-lite-perl
